footer.description: MK Technindo is an industrial equipment fabrication company specialising in custom conveyor systems and manufacturing solutions tailored to operational requirements.
footer.address: Pergudangan Grand Tambak Sawah No. B7, Jabon, Waru, Sidoarjo, East Java, Indonesia

hero.title: Specialists in Conveyor Systems & Industrial Equipment Fabrication
hero.subtitle: MK Technindo partners with manufacturing companies to design and produce conveyor systems and industrial equipment that are functional, precise, and tailored to real-world operational requirements.
hero.tag3: Based in Sidoarjo, serving all of Indonesia

clients.title: Trusted by major industrial partners and manufacturing companies
clients.description: MK Technindo has supported the fabrication needs of industry leaders including PT INKA Madiun, PT Surabaya Autocomp Indonesia, PT Jatim Autocomp Indonesia, PT Jasuindo Tiga Perkasa, as well as various sectors in food processing, logistics, and automotive.

about.title: A Fabrication Partner That Understands Industrial Needs
about.description: MK Technindo specialises in industrial equipment fabrication, with a primary focus on conveyor system manufacturing and factory operational support solutions. We help companies that require more efficient, organised workflows tailored to their specific production needs.
about.card1Desc: Every solution is designed around specific operational requirements, workflow patterns, and real-world challenges encountered on the factory floor.
about.card2Desc: Each project is approached flexibly to ensure the final result is genuinely aligned with the client's operational objectives.
about.card3Desc: Experienced in delivering conveyor systems and industrial equipment across a wide range of manufacturing operations.

services.title: Fabrication & Conveyor System Solutions for Industrial Operations
services.description: MK Technindo delivers services designed to support industrial workflows more efficiently, systematically, and in line with operational requirements.

items.title: Custom Conveyor Systems
items.desc: Design and fabrication of conveyor systems tailored to your workflow, capacity, and operational requirements.

items.title: Industrial Equipment Fabrication
items.desc: Fabrication of various industrial equipment to support production, material handling, and other technical requirements.

items.title: Modification & Rebuild
items.desc: Adjustment, repair, or redevelopment of existing systems and equipment to better suit current operational needs.

items.title: Installation Support
items.desc: On-site installation and commissioning support to ensure systems operate as designed and intended.

items.title: Technical Consultation
items.desc: Pre-project consultations to thoroughly understand your requirements and identify the most appropriate solution.

items.title: Custom Project Requests
items.desc: Have a specific requirement? The MK Technindo team is ready to develop a fabrication solution that meets your exact needs.

industries.title: Supporting Diverse Industries & Manufacturing Operations
industries.description: MK Technindo handles conveyor system and industrial equipment fabrication needs across a wide range of manufacturing, distribution, and material handling operations.

whyUs.title: The Right Approach for Industrial Operational Needs
whyUs.description: We understand that industrial challenges cannot be resolved with off-the-shelf solutions. Every project is executed with a focus on function, efficiency, and real-world operational requirements.

items.title: Custom-built for your operations
items.desc: Every project is designed based on actual on-site requirements, not generic templates.

items.title: Function and efficiency first
items.desc: Industrial equipment must operate reliably and genuinely support production processes.

items.title: Clear technical communication
items.desc: Project discussions are kept structured and focused to ensure deliverables align with expectations.

items.title: Cross-sector experience
items.desc: We have served manufacturers across multiple sectors, each with unique operational profiles.

items.title: End-to-end project support
items.desc: From initial consultation and fabrication through to on-site installation and commissioning.

items.title: Ready for complex requirements
items.desc: We are experienced in handling highly specific briefs tailored to unique workspaces and production goals.

projects.title: Solutions Tailored to Each Client's Operational Challenges

items.title: Robot Arm & Auto Wrapping
items.desc: Implementation of robotic automation and automatic wrapping machines for assembly line efficiency.

items.title: Lift Cargo & Material Handling
items.desc: Cargo lift and conveyor solutions to streamline material flow within industrial processes.

items.title: Custom Fabrication & CNC Shearing
items.desc: High-precision industrial equipment fabrication using CNC and Laser technology to client specifications.

process.title: A Structured Approach for Consistent, Reliable Results
process.description: MK Technindo follows a disciplined process to translate client requirements into fabrication solutions that are accurate, functional, and ready to deploy.

steps.title: Planning
steps.desc: Initial discussion, requirements gathering, and project planning.

steps.title: Design & Program
steps.desc: Technical design and system programming according to agreed specifications.

steps.title: Approval
steps.desc: Client approval of the design and technical plan before production.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: Precision fabrication and manufacturing process in our workshop.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Safe and timely delivery of equipment to your project site.

steps.title: Installation
steps.desc: On-site system installation, operational testing, and handover.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about fabrication services and conveyor systems at MK Technindo.

items.q: Can MK Technindo build a conveyor system to custom specifications?
items.a: Yes. We handle custom requirements based on each client's specifications, workspace constraints, and operational objectives.

items.q: Which industries do you typically serve?
items.a: We serve a wide range of sectors including food processing, pet food, logistics, footwear manufacturing, automotive components, and other industrial operations.

items.q: Is a consultation available before a project begins?
items.a: Absolutely. We welcome initial discussions to fully understand your needs and recommend the most suitable solution.
This depends on the scope of the project. MK Technindo can support implementation and on-site commissioning where required.

items.q: Can you serve projects outside of East Java?
items.a: This is open to discussion based on the project scope and nature of the work required.

cta.title: Discuss Your Conveyor & Industrial Equipment Needs with MK Technindo
cta.description: Looking for a fabrication solution that genuinely fits your operational workflow? The MK Technindo team is ready to assist from consultation through to full implementation.

chat.title: MK Technindo AI
chat.subtitle: Industrial Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I am the MK Technindo AI assistant. May I know your name and which company you are from? Please feel free to ask about our conveyor systems or industrial fabrication services.

aboutPage.heroTitle: MK Technindo — Your Fabrication Partner for Conveyors & Industrial Equipment
aboutPage.heroDesc: MK Technindo specialises in industrial equipment fabrication, with a focus on conveyor systems and custom solutions for manufacturing operations.
aboutPage.profileTitle: Solutions Grounded in Real Industrial Requirements
aboutPage.p1: MK Technindo was established to assist manufacturing companies and industrial sectors in need of conveyor systems and industrial equipment designed to precise, real-world specifications.
aboutPage.p2: We recognise that every production process has its own unique character, capacity, and challenges. Our approach therefore focuses on functionality, efficiency, and genuine operational alignment.
aboutPage.p3: With extensive experience in fabrication and conveyor system delivery, MK Technindo is committed to providing purposeful, relevant solutions for the demands of modern industry.
aboutPage.strengthTitle: A More Precise Approach to Industrial Fabrication
aboutPage.strengthDesc: MK Technindo goes beyond execution — we ensure every solution is genuinely aligned with the client's operational context and objectives.

strengths.title: Custom to your requirements
strengths.desc: Every project is executed based on actual on-site requirements, not standardised templates.

strengths.title: Focused on function
strengths.desc: Solutions are designed to support operational efficiency and process continuity.

strengths.title: Clear technical communication
strengths.desc: Project discussions are structured to ensure the final output meets all expectations.

strengths.title: Ready for diverse sectors
strengths.desc: We have experience serving a broad range of industrial and manufacturing clients.

items.title: Foundation
items.desc: Established as CV. Maju Kawan Technindo with 3 employees, focusing on initial projects like trolley manufacturing.

items.title: Administrative Development
items.desc: Refined administrative and financial systems and expanded the team to 17 personnel.

items.title: PKP Certification
items.desc: Officially became a Taxable Person (PKP) and added professional drafters for fabrication design.

items.title: Major Industry Trust
items.desc: Began serving major corporations such as PT INKA Madiun and the Autocomp Indonesia network.

items.title: CNC Technology Investment
items.desc: Upgraded production capabilities with CNC Bending and CNC Shearing machines.

items.title: Workshop Expansion
items.desc: Operating with two large-scale workshop areas to accelerate production capacity.

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.desc: Established a digital marketing team to expand service outreach across Indonesia.

items.title: Modern Laser Technology
items.desc: Added Pipe Laser and Laser Welding technology for higher precision manufacturing.

items.title: ODOO System Efficiency
items.desc: Implemented ODOO ERP system for more efficient and integrated operational management.

aboutPage.visionDesc: To become a leading industrial equipment fabrication partner that prioritises innovation, precision, and efficient solutions to support the advancement of the manufacturing industry in Indonesia.
missionItems: To produce high-quality fabrication products that meet industrial technical and functionality standards.
To develop innovative conveyor system solutions to enhance client operational efficiency.
To build long-term partnerships based on trust, professionalism, and reliable after-sales service.
To continuously invest in the latest manufacturing technology to ensure production precision and speed.

servicesPage.heroTitle: Conveyor & Industrial Equipment Fabrication Services for Manufacturing
servicesPage.heroDesc: MK Technindo delivers services engineered to support industrial operational needs more efficiently, systematically, and in accordance with on-site requirements.
servicesPage.approachTitle: Solutions Aligned with Real-World Operational Requirements
servicesPage.ap1: Every industrial requirement has its own character. MK Technindo therefore does not apply a one-size-fits-all approach across projects.
servicesPage.ap2: We begin by thoroughly understanding operational needs, site conditions, technical requirements, and intended use — ensuring every solution is truly relevant to the client's work.
servicesPage.ap3: This focused approach enables our fabrication process to deliver systems that are more precise, more functional, and deployment-ready.
servicesPage.ctaTitle: Discuss the Right Service Solution for Your Industrial Operations
servicesPage.ctaDesc: The MK Technindo team is ready to help you identify project requirements and determine the most appropriate fabrication or conveyor system solution.

proPage.heroDesc: MK Technindo demonstrates unwavering commitment to professional excellence through precision engineering, systematic project management, and delivery of solutions that exceed industrial expectations.

standards.desc: Every project reflects our dedication to professional excellence and technical precision.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.desc: Every design and fabrication detail is engineered with meticulous attention to technical specifications and operational requirements.

items.title: Systematic Project Management
items.desc: Structured project execution from consultation through installation ensures predictable timelines and consistent quality.

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.desc: Rigorous quality checks at every stage guarantee solutions meet both industry standards and client expectations.

items.title: Technical Documentation
items.desc: Comprehensive documentation and clear communication ensure transparency and traceability throughout the project lifecycle.

items.title: Safety Compliance
items.desc: All solutions adhere to relevant safety standards and regulations, prioritizing workplace safety and operational reliability.

items.title: Continuous Improvement
items.desc: Lessons learned from each project drive ongoing refinement of processes, techniques, and service delivery.

whyChoose.title: The Value of Professional Expertise
whyChoose.desc: Partnering with a professional team means investing in reliability, efficiency, and long-term operational success.

items.title: Proven Track Record
items.desc: Years of experience across diverse industries provide deep insights into varied operational challenges and solutions.

items.title: Technical Competence
items.desc: Skilled engineers and fabricators bring specialized knowledge to every custom solution.

items.title: Risk Mitigation
items.desc: Professional approach minimizes project risks through careful planning, validation, and quality control.

items.title: Cost Efficiency
items.desc: Right-first-time execution reduces rework, downtime, and total cost of ownership.

items.title: Long-term Partnership
items.desc: Commitment extends beyond delivery with ongoing support and continuous improvement recommendations.

items.title: Accountability
items.desc: Clear responsibility and transparent communication ensure issues are resolved promptly and professionally.

cta.title: Experience the Professional Difference
cta.desc: Discover how MK Technindo's professional approach can transform your industrial equipment and conveyor system projects.
